function: Generates and posts a greeting message on Instagram every day at 11:55 am
last_output:
Instagram Post:
Image: https://example.com/joy.jpg
Caption: Joy is the quiet power that turns simple moments into celebrations. Today, let your joy be the unspoken language that connects hearts and reminds us of life's beautiful simplicity. 🌻
*Posted at 11:55 AM*

function: Sends a greeting message to LinkedIn every day at 12:15 pm
last_output: LinkedIn Post: Hi everyone! 💪 Today's resilience: What's a challenge you overcame this week that taught you resilience? Let's share and stay strong together! #Resilience #Challenge #Strength
